text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho's peer struggles to take her first
step back onto the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy says that Sweep Tosho's magic
left her eager to continue racing, and helped her
find her courage. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she watches the Takarazuka Kinen on TV,
she feels she'd be unable to even stand beside
Sweep Tosho, and that there's an invisible wall
between them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the frustration lingers... Could it be that she
actually wants Sweep Tosho to cast some magic
on her too?
